chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-184 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 565/25 2.For orders on office objections 3.For orders on CMA 566/25 4.For hearing of main case 28-07-2025 Mr. Saif-ur-Rehman Naich, Advocate for the petitioner. **** Through instant petition, petitioner seeks directions to respondents No.2 to 6 to recover alleged abductee from the clutches of respondents No.7 to 11 and produce her before this Court. At the very outset, learned counsel for petitioner submits that Mst. Fatima alias Khadija, daughter of petitioner was forcibly abductee away by private respondents and such FIR No.68 of 2024 was lodged at P.S, Abad u/sections 452 and 365-B PPC and after investigation, interim Challan has been submitted before Judicial Magistrate-III, Sukkur. M/s Syed Sardar Ali Shah, APG & Ghulam Abbas Kubar, AAG present in Court in other matters while waiving notice submit that since interim Challan has been submitted in the above matter; therefore, it would be just and proper to direct the Judicial Magistrate to take all out coercive measures to procure the attendance of alleged abductee being the star witness of the case. After such statement, learned counsel for petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. In view of above, instant petition is disposed of along with listed applications with directions to Judicial Magistrate-III, Sukkur and/or trial Court, as the case may be, to take concrete efforts to procure the attendance of alleged abductee being the star witness of the case under compliance report to this Court through its Additional Registrar.

After such statement, learned counsel for petitioner being satisfied seeks disposal of instant petition. In view of above, instant petition is disposed of along with listed applications with directions to Judicial Magistrate-III, Sukkur and/or trial Court, as the case may be, to take concrete efforts to procure the attendance of alleged abductee being the star witness of the case under compliance report to this Court through its Additional Registrar. JUDGE Ahmad
